name: @llm-output-guard/browser-extension
description: Chrome extension for detecting broken Markdown code fences in LLM web UIs.

scripts.build: tsup src/contentScript.ts --format iife --global-name LlmOutputGuard --out-dir dist --platform browser --clean && node scripts/finalizeBuild.mjs
scripts.dev: tsup src/contentScript.ts --format iife --global-name LlmOutputGuard --out-dir dist --platform browser --watch --onSuccess "node scripts/finalizeBuild.mjs"
